title: Bhiwāni Heat Wave
lead: Bhiwāni is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.09. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Bhiwāni is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 9.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 63%, and the wind speed is 10.7 km/h, which is not sufficient to provide relief. 
 The city's energy consumption is expected to increase significantly due to the high demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
